title: List keys
excerpt: description: Enumerate all keys in a Workers KV namespace using the list() method, with support for pagination and filtering by prefix. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. To list all the keys in your KV namespace, call the `list()` method of the [KV binding](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/concepts/kv-bindings/) on any [KV namespace](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/concepts/kv-namespaces/) you have bound to your Worker code: The `list()` method returns a promise you can `await` on to get the value.
